title: Only Optimized (NEOFORGE)
description: Only Optimized is a modpack that has no extra features so is great to create as a template if you want to make something with more features. supports 1.21.8 (1.21.10, 1.21.9, and earlier versions coming soon!)
body:
# Heres what it does
Only Optimized is a modpack with no extra quality of life features so acts great as a template to use whenever you want to make a new instance with more features. You can also use Only Optimized as vanilla minecraft because it adds absolutly nothing to the game execpt higher performance. It has features like having less lag spikes, smoother FPS, improving mob AI, more optimized block ticking, dynamic FPS, and more!
# Here are the Mods... (13)
- Bad Optimizations
- Cloth Config API
- Clumps
- Cull Leaves
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Ferrite Core
- FPS Reducer
- Immediately Fast
- Lithium
- More Culling
- Sodium
